name: pdf-cli
description: Merge, split, extract pages from, and generate PDF files from templates or markdown.
author: ScripTron Community

args_schema.name: action
args_schema.description: Action to perform: merge | split | extract | generate | info

args_schema.name: input
args_schema.description: Input PDF file path (or space-separated list for merge)

args_schema.name: template
args_schema.description: Template name for generate action (e.g. hr_report, invoice)

args_schema.name: data
args_schema.description: JSON data object for template filling

examples: pdf-cli merge jan.pdf feb.pdf mar.pdf --output q1_combined.pdf
